evals.prompt: I need distrusted CA for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the distrusted-ca-checker skill for this distrusted ca checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects distrusted-ca-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_distrusted_ca.
Keeps the response focused on detecting certificates issued by known distrusted or compromised Certificate Authorities (DigiNotar, WoSign, StartCom, Symantec legacy, CNNIC, TrustCor, DarkMatter).

evals.prompt: Handle a focused distrusted ca checker workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the distrusted-ca-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects distrusted-ca-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
